description.ko: 빛나는 심해의 물결 띠가 투명한 해파리들을 푸른 어둠 속으로 고요히 이끕니다.
description.en: A calm deep-sea ribbon of glowing current carries translucent jellyfish through layered blue darkness.

prompt: AQUA-5 Deep Ocean composition in open midnight water, centered on a suspended Mobius-like ribbon of current twisting gently through the frame as one continuous translucent water sheet. The ribbon shows calm fluid dynamics through fine laminar striations, soft pressure ripples, and refracted #006994 blue-green edges fading into #000080 depth. Translucent jellyfish forms hover along both faces of the twisting flow like clear glass lanterns caught in a peaceful drift: thin bell domes, folded veil membranes, faint radial veins, and short floating tendrils tilted by the passing current. Their rims glow with restrained #40E0D0 bioluminescence, while slow #48D1CC pulses travel through the gelatin bodies and reflect across the curved water surface. Tiny bubbles do not spiral or form curtains; instead they skim the ribbon surface in scattered crescent clusters, briefly flattening into oval lenses before lifting away as sparse pearl beads that reveal measured medium-paced motion. Medium-density luminous plankton particles float at layered depths, creating quiet underwater space, soft volumetric radiance, crisp macro detail, and the calm dance of transparent deep-sea life far from any seabed, vents, vessels, ruins, or machinery.
